items.title: New Zealand Dollar Faces Tough Third Quarter on Growth Headwinds
items.summary: New Zealand’s dollar is facing a subdued third quarter as a resurgent greenback and the lingering effects of the Iran war’s energy shock drag on the domestic recovery.

items.title: RT by @WhiteHouse: FOR THIRTEEN MONTHS. ZERO ILLEGAL ALIENS HAVE BEEN ADMITTED TO THE UNITED STATES. All we needed was a new President—and a Secretary of War who put AMERICA FIRST.
items.summary:

items.title: trump issues a direct warning to iran stating that any escalation of conflict will lead to war
Gold Declines as Fresh US-Iran Tension Fans Inflation Concerns
items.summary: Gold declined to near $4,000 an ounce after the US and Iran traded attacks in the Persian Gulf, straining a ceasefire that had last week seen energy prices fall to pre-war levels and help temper expectations for an interest-rate hike.

items.title: Trump is threatening a new trade war . The EU should call his bluff
Top South African police officer survives assassination attempt
items.summary: Deputy crime intelligence boss Maj-Gen Feroz Khan was due to appear before an inquiry into police corruption this week.

items.title: Goldman Backs India 30-Year Bonds as Iran War Impact Contained
items.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. recommends buying India’s 30-year government bonds as inflation expectations ease and lower oil prices reduce fiscal risks.

items.title: Dubai Stocks Set for Best Quarter in a Year as War Premium Ebbs
items.summary: Dubai’s stocks index is set for its best quarter in a year after a truce in the Middle East conflict drew investors back to a market they fled when Iranian missile attacks shattered the city-state’s reputation for stability.

items.title: Spain Lifts 2026 Economic-Growth Forecast Despite Iran War
items.summary: Spain will continue to outperform the euro area’s largest economies, with the conflict in Iran expected to have only a limited impact, according to new government forecasts.

items.title: JPMorgan’s Matejka Is Biggest Europe Stocks Bull With New Target
items.summary: As European stocks were hammered by the Iran war, JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Mislav Matejka predicted the declines would be short-lived. The strategist is now doubling down, becoming the biggest bull among forecasters tracked by Bloomberg.

items.title: No choice but to build atomic bomb : IRGC - linked media urges Iran to pursue nuclear weapon despite US deal
The World Is Racing to Develop New Nuclear Fuels
Wall Street Is Abandoning Bets on a Stronger Euro
items.summary: Wall Street banks are capitulating on bets for a stronger euro, as markets see the US outpacing Europe on interest-rate hikes for the rest of this year.

items.title: PBOC’s New Overnight Rate Said Below Forecasts in Hint at Easing
items.summary: China’s central bank set the interest rate on its new overnight liquidity tool at a level that was below expectations, according to people familiar with the matter, in what some economists see as a de facto rate cut that could push down market borrowing costs.

items.title: Bursting Of AI Bubble , Collapse Of Circular Deals Are Among Top Risks To Global Financial System , BIS Warns
यूक्रेनी हमलों से दो और रूसी रिफायनरियों में आग लगी , पहली बार पुतिन ने माना - मुश्किल दौर में मॉस्को - putin admits russia faces difficult period amid ukraine war
Bond Heavyweights Target a Market Sweet Spot for New Warsh Era
items.summary: Some of the biggest bond managers are zeroing in on one specific area of the market as the best place to ride out the early days of the Kevin Warsh era.

items.title: Iran attacks Bahrain and Kuwait following US strikes and threatens to halt talks to end the war
US Futures Climb on Reports Peace Talks to Resume: Markets Wrap
items.summary: US equity futures climbed after reports that the US and Iran stepped back from an escalation in hostilities that had threatened the fragile ceasefire underpinning peace talks.

items.title: We Are Entering The Most Dangerous Chapter Of World War III That We Have Experienced So Far As The Agreement With Iran Collapses
